summary: Completed comprehensive testing of two new features: 1) Drag & drop rescheduling on calendar (admin only, auto-save immediately), 2) Multi-subject independent scheduling with subject-teacher mapping per student. Both features are working correctly with proper role-based access control.
passed_tests: Subject-teacher mapping CRUD operations (create, read, delete)
Calendar drag & drop functionality in month view
Calendar drag & drop functionality in week view
Teacher/Student calendars do NOT have drag functionality
Subject field in class scheduling form
Subject column in admin classes table
Subject assignments table with student, subject badge, teacher columns
Subject assignments grouped by student view
Class detail panel with join links and admin-only regenerate zoom button
Auto-save with toast feedback on successful reschedule
Month view drops preserve original time, week view drops set new hour
All existing features (login, CRUD, attendance, etc.) still work
Backend API endpoints returning correct status codes
Frontend UI elements properly styled and interactive
